intro: The ground turns to soup beneath you. With a sucking lurch, {{sinkingName}} drops to its belly and starts to sink into the mire!
title: The Sinking Mire
description: {{sinkingName}} is going under fast. You can send another Pokemon to haul it free - but the bog only lets up for those who can stay above it or wrench it loose: a Flying or Levitating mon, a light one, or a strong enough lifter. Or you can leave it to claw out alone and pay the bog its toll.
query: How do you get it out?

1.label: Haul it out
1.tooltip: (?) Pick a rescuer. A Flying/Levitate/light or strong-Attack mon succeeds (a Rogue reward); a heavy weakling flounders (mire damage + a lost item).
1.selectPrompt: Send which Pokemon to the rescue?
1.selected: You send your chosen Pokemon out across the treacherous mud.

2.label: Leave it
2.tooltip: (-) Don't risk a second mon. The sinking mon claws out alone, but the bog keeps one of its held items.
2.selected: You hold the rest of the team back.

invalidSelection: That is the Pokemon that is sinking.
rescued: Your rescuer drags the sinker free of the muck - and comes up clutching something the mire swallowed long ago!
floundered: The rescuer can't get a hold and only flounders. The mire drags at the sinking Pokemon, and the bog swallows something it was holding.
left: Left to itself, the Pokemon thrashes free of the mire - but the bog keeps a souvenir.
